intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再按中文电影线记忆：全村知道丢钱 -> Sam 丢钱包 -> 带 savings 去 post office -> 钱包肯定被人捡到但没有还 -> 三个月后钱包包着报纸回来一半 -> 50% 小偷 -> 又还一些 -> 25% 小偷 -> 最后全还清 -> 100% honest。读的时候把被动语态读清楚，纸条句要带一点荒唐的幽默感。

sentences.text: The whole village soon learnt that a large sum of money had been lost.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：全村知道丢了一大笔钱。The whole village 后轻停；a large sum of money 是一大笔钱；had been lost 是过去完成被动。

sentences.text: Sam Benton, the local butcher, had lost his wallet while taking his savings to the post office.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：本地 butcher Sam 丢了 wallet。Sam Benton 和 the local butcher 是同位说明；savings 和 post office 要读清楚。

sentences.text: Sam was sure that the wallet must have been found by one of the villagers, but it was not returned to him.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：Sam 觉得钱包肯定被村民捡到了，但没人还。must have been found 是过去被动推测；was not returned 是转折后的结果。

sentences.text: Three months passed, and then one morning, Sam found his wallet outside his front door.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：三个月后，钱包出现在家门口。Three months passed 后停顿；outside his front door 是关键地点。

sentences.text: It had been wrapped up in newspaper and it contained half the money he had lost, together with a note which said: 'A thief, yes, but only 50 per cent a thief!'
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：报纸包着，里面只有一半钱和 50% 小偷纸条。had been wrapped up 是被动；note 部分要读出荒唐自辩的味道。

sentences.text: Two months later, some more money was sent to Sam with another note: 'Only 25 per cent a thief now!'
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：两个月后，又还一些，变成 25% 小偷。Two months later 是时间推进；was sent 是匿名归还的被动语态。

sentences.text: In time, all Sam's money was paid back in this way.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：最后钱全还清。In time 是 eventually；all Sam's money 要读出全部；was paid back 是被动结果。

sentences.text: The last note said: 'I am 100 per cent honest now!'
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：最后他说自己 100% honest。The last note said 后停顿；100 per cent honest 要读得自豪但有点荒唐。
